0100100101101101 1100010011110000 1 -> sum: 0000111001011110, cout: 1
1110000011011111 0110101101000101 0 -> sum: 0100110000100100, cout: 1

0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
